# Temporary baseline of currently oversized Lean files (>1000 lines).
# Issue #1127 — these files must eventually be split.  Each entry records the
# current line count as a ceiling; CI will fail if a file grows beyond this
# or if a new oversized file appears without an entry here.
#
# Maintenance: when a file is split and drops below 1000 lines, remove its
# entry.  When a file is partially split (reduced but still >1000), update
# the ceiling to the new lower count.  New oversized files are never added
# here — they should be split instead.
#
# Format:  path/to/file.lean: line_count
#
# Last updated: 2026-05-03 (current state of main)

MIPStarRE/LDT/Test/MainTheorem.lean: 5876
MIPStarRE/LDT/MainInductionStep/Theorems.lean: 4725
